name: roofing-ceiling-stain
description: Large brown stain on my ceiling, no obvious source. Appeared after recent wind and rain.

hypotheses.label: Blocked gutter overflow
evidence_for: Heavy rain could back up into eaves
evidence_against: Stain position would need to be near eaves

hypotheses.label: Failed valley or ridge flashing
evidence_against: Would appear near ridge or valley, not centre of ceiling

mockAgentOutput.what_we_dont_know: We cannot tell from the description where on the ceiling the stain is — whether it's under the roof slope, near the eaves, or under the ridge.
mockAgentOutput.why_it_matters: The position of the stain maps directly to the roof component above it, which tells us where to start the repair.

chips.text: Stain is in the middle of the ceiling.
Stain is near the edge or corner.
Stain runs along a line under the roof ridge.

expected.must_ask_about: position of the stain on the ceiling
